items.name_en: Chan1✔️Vintage original pre-owned CF Black Lamb Skin
items.name_cn:
Chan1✔️Vintage original pre-owned CF Black Lamb Skin
The CF Chanel grandma's heirloom is here! The most classic vintage CF black lamb skin with quilted pattern + gold metal, timeless classic flap
Rich vintage vibe~ really heart-fluttering. Twist lock closure with sliding chain, switch between shoulder and crossbody easily. Perfect size, super versatile for daily wear
Size: 26cm
Number: A2220 Black Lamb Skin

items.name_en: New: Pre-owned model zp edition
items.name_cn:
New: Pre-owned model zp edition
Chan1 Large Crossbody Bag Retro chain decoration makes the whole bag unique, full of artistic atmosphere. The flap design highlights a casual style, not too restrictive, letting you show your most natural state anytime, anywhere. The quality is reliable, no need to worry about defects. Made of premium materials, ensuring durability and longevity. Internal details are also exquisite, effectively protecting your items, giving you peace of mind when going out. In summary, this exclusive vintage pre-owned shoulder bag is the perfect choice for casual elegance! It not only boosts your fashion index but also shows your personality and taste. Whether at any time or place, it makes you radiate charm and become the focus of attention. Get it now, let yourself exude charm every day.
Code: 3329
Size: 34cm
